_comment: Curated content for the root portfolio. scripts/generate.py merges this with live GitHub repo data and renders scripts/template.html -> ../index.html. Edit here, never hand-edit the generated index.html.

meta.title: Nik Hruska — Problem Solutions
meta.description: Nik Hruska — software engineer and co-founder at Problem Solutions. Builds, experiments and tools, shipped in the open.

hero.lead: Software engineer & co-founder at Problem Solutions.
hero.bio: I build software, agent systems, and small sharp tools - for clients, for the company, and for myself. This is where the open ones live. Made it, shipped it, here it is.

builds.title: Music
builds.desc: Ukulele & guitar performance tools - mic tuners, chord composers, a 50-song library and a fullscreen perform mode. Built for myself, shipped in the open.

builds.title: More, soon
builds.desc: Experiments, proofs-of-concept and professional work land here as they're ready.

github_section.label: Open source
github_section.intro: Public repositories, freshest first - regenerated daily from the GitHub API.
